name: template
description: Full-stack web app template — .NET backend + React/Vite frontend

scripts.setup: npm run setup:client && npm run setup:server
scripts.dev: echo "Run 'npm run dev:client' and 'npm run dev:server' in separate terminals"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.test: npm run test:client && npm run test:server
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:migrate: dotnet ef database update --project Template.Data --startup-project Template.Server
scripts.db:migration:add: dotnet ef migrations add --project Template.Data --startup-project Template.Server
scripts.clean: npm run clean:client && npm run clean:server
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && cd Template.Client && rimraf node_modules
